title: ctenitis eatonii
intro: Ctenitis eatonii, also known as Eaton's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis eatonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
